title: Blog Post Frontmatter
description: JSON schema for validating blog post frontmatter extracted from curated gist Markdown files

date.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) the post was published

summary.description: Short summary shown on list cards and used for meta descriptions

slug.description: Explicit URL slug; falls back to a slugified title when omitted

source.description: Markdown file name within the gist to use as the post source, required when the gist has multiple Markdown files
